历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 20810, 15567, 18825, 18725, and 17328 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 17328, with a fluctuation range of approximately 15500–18800 in the past three years. The science enrollment plans from 2021 to 2024 were 43, 40, 40, and 41 respectively, and the physics category plan for 2025 is 43. The physics category plan for 2026 is 38, a reduction of about 11.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been rising continuously, from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to a controversial recruitment announcement incident (which has been terminated and apologized for), but its impact on application psychology is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (average), with moderate short video exposure and no obvious signs of increased application attention. No record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Agriculture and Plant Production, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Electrical, Computer, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. Guizhou University offers popular majors like Electrical and Computer in Inner Mongolia, which are attractive to candidates. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 116,000). By historical proportion, physics category candidates are estimated at about 111,000, intensifying competition. Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, far from Inner Mongolia, making it a cross-province application. The university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (about 40 science students), so regional preference has a neutral impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 17328 in 2025, a reduction of about 11.6% in physics category enrollment in 2026 (which decreases the ranking number), continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking (enhancing the university's appeal), and a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), the reduction in enrollment and increase in candidates have opposite effects, but the larger growth in candidate numbers and the university's rising ranking attract more attention, leading to a slight intensification of competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16319, with a range of 15819–16819.

专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has been continuously rising.
